top_signals.title: Fortescue Charters Up to 12 Ammonia-Capable Bulkers from CMB.TECH
top_signals.summary: Australian mining company Fortescue has signed an agreement with Belgian shipping and cleantech group CMB.TECH to charter up to 12 ammonia-capable bulk carriers, stepping up efforts to decarbonize maritime transport and support the development of green ammonia as a marine fuel.Under the agreement…
